rows.label: qev040102_MSG0001
rows.name:
Walolo! Pull yourself together-mo! A new
life for Lana and the others begins now-mo!
Do your best and make it back alive-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Wait, who are you-mo? Do you
have business with Lana-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev040102_SEL0011
rows.name: Say that Bubu asked you to come.

rows.label: qev040102_JNK0020
rows.name: Verify

rows.label: qev040102_SEL0021
rows.name:
Check the situation
Lana is currently in.

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0003
rows.name:
He sent someone all the way out
here-mo? Bubu really is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Wait, this isn't the situation
for that right now-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0005
rows.name:
Anyway, I want you to defeat the Unicols
up there-mo. Once you do that, I'll
talk to you as much as you want-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0006
rows.name:
We were attacked by Unicols on the
way to the Drongo Caravan-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0007
rows.name:
We somehow managed to escape
here... but they're waiting right
up there and we can't move-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0008
rows.name:
Please-mo, I want you to defeat
them-mo. Once you do that, I'll
talk to you as much as you want-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0009
rows.name:
Walolo is frightened too, so I want
you to defeat the Unicols quickly-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Eh? You already defeated the
guys up there-mo? You work quite
fast, it's splendid-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0019
rows.name:
Well then, Lana and the others will head to the
Drongo Caravan first, so you should come too-mo.
I'll talk to you about various things there-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0022
rows.name: Thank you for saving us earlier-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0023
rows.name:
But... I feel bad for my lifesaver...
but Lana cannot return to Bubu-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0024
rows.name:
Lana is going to be together with
Walolo here-mo! Please-mo! I want
you to acknowledge our love-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_JNK0050
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev040102_SEL0051
rows.name:
Touched by Lana's earnest feelings,
acknowledge her resolve.

rows.label: qev040102_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev040102_SEL0061
rows.name: Do not forgive her betrayal of Bubu.

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0025
rows.name:
You're a very wonderful person-mo!
Fufu! In that case, Lana will start
her second life here with Walolo-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0026
rows.name:
What you're saying is correct-mo. But...
our love cannot be stopped-mo! I will start
my second life here with Walolo-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Eh!? No way-mo! Because Lana is
married to her husband Bubu, right-mo?
That's too much of a hassle-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0028
rows.name:
Wait! I won't let you escape-mo!
Take responsibility like a man-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0029
rows.name:
Im-impossible-mo! Walolo is going back
to NLA now-mo! Well then, goodbye...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0030
rows.name:
Guh... This guy has no guts
at all-mo. At this rate, Lana's
plan will be ruined-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0031
rows.name:
...That's right! Walolo!
Actually... in Lana's tummy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0032
rows.name: Walolo's child is in there-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0033
rows.name:
Eeeeeeeeh!! Walolo is
going to be a father-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0034
rows.name:
That's right-mo! So prepare
yourself and take care of Lana-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0035
rows.name:
...Right? You think he should
do that too, don't you-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_JNK0070
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev040102_SEL0071
rows.name:
Nod and agree that he should
definitely take responsibility.

rows.label: qev040102_JNK0080
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev040102_SEL0081
rows.name: Stare at Lana with a suspicious gaze.

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0036
rows.name:
See! This person is saying
so too-mo! Anyway, Walolo,
you have to be with Lana-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0037
rows.name:
What-mo? Doubting me without any
proof, you're a terrible person-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0038
rows.name:
...Now, Walolo! There's no
time to worry-mo! Our child
will be born very soon-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0039
rows.name:
Guh-guh-guh... I understand-mo...
If that's the case... Walolo
will take responsibility-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0040
rows.name: ...Alright![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0041
rows.name:
Well then, Earthling over there,
go get the materials needed to
make a safe childbirth charm-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0042
rows.name:
For materials, the Golden Puffs dropped
by the monsters on this continent and
Aranea Enma Silk are good-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0043
rows.name:
Well then, for Lana's... No, for our
child's sake, I'm counting on you-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0044
rows.name:
The materials needed to make the charm
are Golden Puffs dropped by Mephites on
this continent and Aranea Enma Silk-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0045
rows.name:
...Eh? Bubu? I want you to forget
about him for now-mo. Right now, I
want you to think about our child-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0046
rows.name:
Ugh... It's about to be born-mo!
Walolo's child is about to be born-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0047
rows.name:
Lana, are you okay-mo? Walolo is
right here, so stay strong-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0048
rows.name:
Ooh! If I don't have the safe childbirth
charm, it will be terrible-mo! Have you
not gotten the materials yet-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0049
rows.name:
Yeah, I can make it with this-mo. Well
then, Lana is going to go give birth-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0050
rows.name: ...Take this... do this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0051
rows.name: Attach the eyes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0052
rows.name: ...Alright... it's complete-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0053
rows.name:
Walolo!! The child is! Being
boooooooooooooorn-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0054
rows.name:
Th... this is Walolo's child-mo!
It's tiny and so very cute-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_JNK0090
rows.name: Quip

rows.label: qev040102_SEL0091
rows.name:
Point out that it just looks
like a regular stuffed animal.

rows.label: qev040102_JNK0100
rows.name: Emotion

rows.label: qev040102_SEL0101
rows.name: Tremble at the birth of a new life.

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0055
rows.name:
Ah, you're right-mo! I can
see... the sloppy stitching-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0056
rows.name: Tch! Saying unnecessary things...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0057
rows.name: Lana, what is the meaning of this-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0058
rows.name:
...If I'm found out, it can't
be helped-mo. I'll tell you
everything honestly-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0059
rows.name:
Lana just got sick of it-mo. Bubu
is far too clingy with Lana-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0060
rows.name:
Even when I try to go out to play,
he says it's dangerous and constantly
follows right behind me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0061
rows.name:
He blows on my soup so I won't get burned,
making my nice warm soup all cold...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0062
rows.name:
Geez! It was so annoying-mo! So,
I set my sights on Walolo and
tried to start a new life-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0063
rows.name: Wh...! Walolo was tricked-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0064
rows.name:
That's right-mo! And I was so
close too, what a shame-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0065
rows.name:
...Hmph! It can't be helped, so I'll go
back to NLA-mo. It was a short time,
but thanks for taking care of me-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0066
rows.name:
You feel the same as Walolo-mo?
Children are amazing-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0067
rows.name:
Lana... let's all be happy
together-mo. I'll build a new
house in this caravan too-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0068
rows.name: ...Alright![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0069
rows.name:
Well then, person over there, could
you say hello to Bubu for me-mo?
Lana is going to be happy here-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0070
rows.name:
He used to be clingy all day long,
but lately Bubu has been acting
prickly-mo... Somehow it's very...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0071
rows.name:
Manly and cool-mo! If it's a Bubu
like this, I want to be with him-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0072
rows.name:
Phew... Everything went exactly according to Lana's
plan-mo. With this, I can get away from that clingy,
annoying Bubu and live however I please-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040102_MSG0073
rows.name:
...Wait, did you hear Lana
talking to herself-mo? You
better forget it immediately-mo.[ST:wait ]
